description: OFFICIAL SSB property tax data for all 357 Norwegian municipalities. Tax rates are in PROMILLE (‰) as per SSB standard.

data_explanation.skattesats_bolig_promille: Tax rate for residential properties in PROMILLE (‰) - official SSB format
data_explanation.skattesats_bolig_prosent: Tax rate for residential properties in PERCENT (%) - converted for calculations
data_explanation.skattesats_naering_promille: Tax rate for commercial properties in PROMILLE (‰) - official SSB format
data_explanation.skattesats_naering_prosent: Tax rate for commercial properties in PERCENT (%) - converted for calculations
data_explanation.fritak_aar: Years of exemption for new buildings
data_explanation.formuesgrunnlag: Uses wealth basis for property valuation (true/false)

important_notes: Tax rates are provided in both PROMILLE (‰) and PERCENT (%) formats
Use PERCENT values for calculations: skattesats_bolig_prosent
Data is directly from SSB official table published 2025
325 out of 357 municipalities have some form of property tax
249 municipalities have property tax on residential properties
Includes 32 municipalities without property tax (eiendomsskatt_bolig: false)
